# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any
    
    parameters {
        choice(
            name: 'ARTIFACT_SOURCE',
            choices: ['S3', 'ARTIFACTORY', 'HTTP'],
            description: 'Source of the build artifact'
        )
        string(
            name: 'ARTIFACT_URL',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'URL of the build artifact'
        )
        string(
            name: 'ARTIFACT_NAME',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Name of the artifact to download'
        )
        string(
            name: 'DEPLOY_SERVERS',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Comma separated list of production servers'
        )
        string(
            name: 'DEPLOY_PATH',
            defaultValue: '/opt/app',
            description: 'Path to deploy artifacts on production servers'
        )
    }
    
    stages {
        stage('Download Artifact') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def artifactFile = "${params.ARTIFACT_NAME}"
                    
                    if (params.ARTIFACT_SOURCE == 'S3') {
                        withCredentials([aws(accessKeyVariable: 'AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID', secretKeyVariable: 'AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY')]) {
                            sh "aws s3 cp ${params.ARTIFACT_URL} ${artifactFile}"
                        }
                    } else if (params.ARTIFACT_SOURCE == 'ARTIFACTORY') {
                        def auth = base64Encode("${ARTIFACTORY_USER}:${ARTIFACTORY_PASSWORD}")
                        sh "curl -H 'Authorization: Basic ${auth}' -o ${artifactFile} ${params.ARTIFACT_URL}"
                    } else if (params.ARTIFACT_SOURCE == 'HTTP') {
                        sh "curl -o ${artifactFile} ${params.ARTIFACT_URL}"
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Deploy to Production') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def servers = params.DEPLOY_SERVERS.split(',')
                    
                    for (server in servers) {
                        def cleanServer = server.trim()
                        
                        withCredentials([sshUserPrivateKey(credentialsId: 'ssh-key', keyFileVariable: 'SSH_KEY', usernameVariable: 'SSH_USER')]) {
                            sh """
                                ssh -i \$SSH_KEY -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no \$SSH_USER@${cleanServer} "mkdir -p ${params.DEPLOY_PATH}"
                                scp -i \$SSH_KEY ${params.ARTIFACT_NAME} \$SSH_USER@${cleanServer}:${params.DEPLOY_PATH}/${params.ARTIFACT_NAME}
                                ssh -i \$SSH_KEY -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no \$SSH_USER@${cleanServer} "chmod +x ${params.DEPLOY_PATH}/${params.ARTIFACT_NAME}"
                            """
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
    post {
        success {
            echo 'Deployment completed successfully'
        }
        failure {
            echo 'Deployment failed'
        }
    }
}
